title: Good: Buffer sizing rationale with OSCORE forward-pointer
description:
The comment at lichen_l2.c:44-56 explains buffer sizing (MTU + 40 for IPv6 base header), acknowledges the limitation (no extension headers), and explicitly notes that OSCORE support will require revisiting buffer sizes. This prevents future developers from cargo-culting the buffer size without understanding why.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:44-56
